data.title: American Coastal Insurance Corp released financial results for Q4 and year ended Dec 31, 2025. Quarterly conference call on Feb 19 at 5:00 PM ET. Website has earnings presentation.
data.description: The company will be conducting its quarterly conference call at 5:00 P.M. ET on February 19, 2026. This information is to be reviewed alongside an earnings presentation accessible on the company's website at investors.amcoastal.com/events-and-presentations.

data.title: Armada Acquisition Corp. III closes $248.5 million IPO with 24,850,000 units sold at $10 each on Nasdaq.
data.description: Armada Acquisition Corp. III, also known as AACI, completed its initial public offering by closing 24,850,000 units at $10.00 per unit, which included partial exercise of an over-allotment option. This offering generated $248,500,000 in gross proceeds for the company. The units started trading on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol "AACIU" on February 18, 2026. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and half of one [unspecified item].

data.title: STRATA Skin Sciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: SSKN) confirms Nasdaq delisting, suspends trading, and plans to deregister its common stock.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, STRATA Skin Sciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: SSKN), based in Horsham, Pennsylvania, announced the filing of a Form 25 with the SEC to deregister its common stock under Section 12(b) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934. This move led to the suspension of trading of the Company's common stock on The Nasdaq Capital Market from the same date. The Company plans to file a Form 15 with the SEC around March 2, 2026, to initiate the termination process of its common stock registration under Section 12(g) of the Exchange Act. This action will also suspend the Company's reporting obligations under Sections 13(a) and 15(d) of the Exchange Act, a process commonly known as "going dark."

data.title: Beta Bionics to present at TD Cowen's Health Care Conference on March 4, 2026, at 10:30 am Eastern Time.
data.description: In Irvine, California on February 19, 2026, Beta Bionics, Inc., a forefront company in advanced diabetes management solutions, disclosed that they will be presenting at TD Cowen’s 46th Annual Health Care Conference on Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 10:30 am ET (7:30 am PT). The company is listed on Nasdaq as BBNX.

data.title: Organogenesis Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ORGO) will report Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Feb. 26, 2026.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Organogenesis Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ORGO) based in Canton, MA, revealed they will disclose their financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 after the market closes on February 26th. The company specializes in regenerative medicine products for Advanced Wound Care, Surgical, and Sports Medicine markets. The announcement suggests forthcoming insights into their revenue, profits, and overall business health for the mentioned periods. It demonstrates the company's commitment to transparency and providing stakeholders with up-to-date information on their financial standing and operations.

data.title: KBRA assigns prelim ratings to BSPDF 2026-FL3. 40 loans balance $878.1M, $145.3M cash for assets in 30-month period.
data.description: In New York, credit rating agency KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to nine classes of BSPDF 2026-FL3, a managed CRE CLO securitization. This transaction allows for reinvestment of principal proceeds for 30 months, with a 180-day ramp-up period. Initially, it will be backed by 40 mortgage loans totaling $878.1 million and $145.3 million in cash collateral for six pre-identified assets.

data.title: ICF awarded multi-million dollar contract amendment by SCE to enhance energy efficiency for customers.
data.description: Reston, VA - On February 19, 2026, ICF (NASDAQ: ICFI), a prominent global solutions and technology provider, secured a lucrative contract amendment from Southern California Edison (SCE), valued in the multi-million dollar range. This expanded initiative aims to assist customers in reducing energy consumption and lowering costs.

data.title: CWST reported financial results for Q4 and FY 2025; stock ticker NASDAQ: CWST; based in Rutland, Vt.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Rutland, Vermont, Casella Waste Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: CWST), a company specializing in solid waste, recycling, and resource management services, released its financial outcomes for the periods ending on December 31, 2025. The report encompassed both quarterly and annual results.

data.title: 10x Genomics will participate in TD Cowen Health Care Conference on March 3, 2026. Management team to attend fireside chat.
data.description: In Pleasanton, California, on February 19, 2026, 10x Genomics, Inc. (Nasdaq: TXG), a prominent player in single cell and spatial biology, revealed that executives from its management team will engage in a fireside chat at the TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference on March 3, 2026.

data.title: Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR) in Texas declares quarterly cash dividends for common and preferred stock for Q1 2026.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on February 19th, 2026, Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR), a leading worldwide provider of cloud and carrier-neutral data center services, disclosed that its board of directors has approved the payment of quarterly cash dividends for both common and preferred stock for the initial quarter of 2026.

data.title: Phoenix Tailings secures $40.2M to boost US rare earth metals production, with total Series B funding at $116.6M.
data.description: Phoenix Tailings, based in Exeter, New Hampshire, has successfully completed a $40.2 million oversubscribed B-3 amplification round, boosting its total Series B funding to $116.6 million. This latest round was made available solely to current investors and specific strategic partners, with $30.2 million in equity and $10 million in venture debt from Nomura. The funding will support Phoenix Tailings in diversifying its offerings beyond neodymium-praseodymium (NdPr), dysprosium (Dy), and terbium production.

data.title: Jack in the Box introduces nationwide matcha beverage lineup, one of the first QSRs in the U.S. to do so. #cravings.
data.description: In San Diego, Jack in the Box (NASDAQ: JACK) has introduced a nationwide lineup of matcha beverages, making it one of the earliest quick-service restaurants (QSRs) in the U.S. to offer matcha drinks. The popular burger chain, also recognized for its tacos, is known for its innovative approach. The addition of matcha to their menu provides customers with an everyday option. This move highlights Jack in the Box's commitment to standing out in the industry.

data.title: Team Cymru supports INTERPOL's Operation Red Card 2.0, targeting cyber crime from Dec 8, 2025 to Jan 30, 2026 globally.
data.description: A company based in Lake Mary, Florida, known as Team Cymru, has revealed its contribution of vital internet intelligence for INTERPOL's Operation Red Card 2.0. This operation, which took place from December 8, 2025, to January 30, 2026, aimed to combat cyber-related criminal activities occurring across various regions. Specifically focusing on high-yield investment scams, mobile money fraud, and deceptive mobile loan applications, Operation Red Card 2.0 targeted both the infrastructure and individuals involved in these illicit activities. Over the course of the eight-week operation, thorough investigations were conducted.

data.title: Hampton by Hilton New Smyrna Beach renovates 112-room hotel on Flagler Avenue, enhancing guestrooms and public spaces.
data.description: A hotel in New Smyrna Beach, Florida, known as the Hampton by Hilton on Flagler Avenue, recently finished a full renovation of its 112-room property. The extensive refurbishment included upgrades to guestrooms and public areas. The renovation project aimed to enhance the overall guest experience and maintain the historic charm of the property. The completion date of the renovation was February 19, 2026.
